Nc3=== White has brought his minor piece into action and taken control of the middle. Simultaneously, he has put pressure on Black's e4-pawn, which Black must now try and defend. [[/3...Nf6|Nf6]] or [[/3...Bf5|Bf5]] would most commonly be used to defend the lone pawn, while [[/3...e5|e5]] gives the option of a pawn transfer. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}.
